title: CHICAS YOUTH DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: ADELANTE MUJERES CHICAS YOUTH DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a youth development program helping Latina girls develop their leadership potential, adopt healthy lifestyles, develop cultural identity, and achieve academic success with high school graduation and college enrollment. Provides an environment in which young Latinas learn from each other and, through their facilitators, what it means to be a successful person, explore career options, and prepare for higher education. 2030 Main Street Suite A Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Latina students in grades 3-12 at participating schools Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm. Program hours include evenings and weekends. Email (503) 992-0078 204 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 992-0078 ext 204 Leticia Aguilar [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Charge for transportation costs DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Beaverton, Forest Grove, and Hillsboro School Districts TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 57 to Forest Grove, Main Street stop Services: Cultural Heritage Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Leadership Development * Hispanic/Latino Community Youth Enrichment Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - MICROENTERPRISE PROGRAMS EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT EDUCATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADELANTE MUJERES
